title: murtughas engleriana
intro: Murtughas engleriana, also known as the Indian spurge or Euphorbia, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Murtughas engleriana lie in its sap, which contains a milky latex that has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Murtughas engleriana include infusions and ointments, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
